name: Dark Chocolate Fudge L'orange
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE SUGAR, SOUR CREAM AND MARGARINE IN A HEAVY SAUCEPAN.
2. BRING TO A FULL ROLLING BOIL, STIRRING CONSTANTLY.
3. CONTINUE BOILING UNTIL THE CANDY THERMOMETER REACHES 234 DEGREES OR FOR ABOUT 5 MINUTES OVER MEDIUM HEAT, STIRRING CONSTANTLY TO PREVENT SCORCHING.
4. ADD MARSHMALLOW CREME AND ORANGE PEEL, STIRRING UNTIL WELL BLEND.
5. REMOVE FROM HEAT AND STIR IN CHOCOLATE BITS UNTIL MELTED.
6. STIR IN NUTS AND VANILLA.
7. POUR INTO A GREASED 8 OR 9-inch SQUARE BAKING PAN.
8. COOL AT ROOM TEMPERATURE.
9. CUT INTO SQUARES. (ORANGE PEEL MAY BE OMITTED IF DESIRED.)
